---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new tool, endpoint coverage, or capability
labels: enhancement
---

## What would you like to do?

<!-- e.g. "I want to read CDS access controls (DCLS) from Claude" -->

## Why?

<!-- The use case. Helps prioritize. -->

## ADT endpoint(s) involved (if known)

<!-- e.g. POST /sap/bc/adt/atc/runs -->

## Would this need a new tool, or could it work via `adt_request`?

<!-- We prefer high-level tools for things agents will hit often, and the
     generic adt_request escape hatch for niche endpoints. -->
